scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w @specforge/backend" "npm run dev -w @specforge/frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @specforge/backend && npm run build -w @specforge/frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @specforge/backend && npm run lint -w @specforge/frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @specforge/backend && npm run typecheck -w @specforge/frontend
